method.name: Generalized Global Ranking-Aware Neural Architecture Ranker (NAR)
key_features: Uses global ranking of architectures according to ground-truth performance
Classifies architectures into multiple quality tiers

performance.nas_bench_101: Finds top 0.01‰ performance architecture by sampling
performance.nas_bench_201: Generalizes well to different image datasets

sub_issues: Prediction bias leading to incorrect rankings

approach.method: Utilizes quality distributions of the search space
process: Classifies architectures into quality tiers by global rankings
Trains predictor by learning features of quality tiers
First classifies quality of architecture, then scores them

title: Generalized Global Ranking-Aware Neural Architecture Ranker for Efficient Image Classifier Search
